title: Path Tracer: From-Scratch C++17 and CUDA Renderer
description: A Monte Carlo path tracer written twice with zero external dependencies: a single-file C++17 CPU reference and a CUDA port mapping one pixel to one GPU thread. Implements Lambertian, metal, and dielectric materials from the math (Snell refraction, Schlick Fresnel), with reproducible seeded renders and a thin-lens depth-of-field camera.
